License for M+ Bitmap Fonts allowing free use, modification, and distribution without warranty.

# Purpose
This document is a license statement for the M+ Bitmap Fonts, created by COZ between 2002 and 2004. It declares that the fonts are free software, allowing users to use, modify, copy, and redistribute them freely, including for commercial purposes. The document also states that the fonts are provided without any warranty.
